text-node.name: text-node
text-node.title: Text Node
text-node.description: Injects a block of free-form text into a mode's customInstructions.

content.title: Content
content.description: The instruction text to inject into the mode's customInstructions.

label.title: Label
label.description: Optional short label displayed on the canvas node.

order.title: Order
order.description: Explicit position of this text block in the customInstructions sequence.
